opportunities.name: Pat Tillman Foundation Scholarship
opportunities.notes: For active-duty veterans and their spouses attending college. NOTE: Check if children of active-duty/veterans qualify (criteria has shifted). If Emilio has served himself or parent is active duty contact foundation directly. October 2026 deadline for 2027-28 AY.

opportunities.name: AIAA Foundation Undergraduate Scholarship
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED for 2026-27 AY - awards pay Fall 2026
opportunities.notes: American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics. Must be AIAA member. Several tiers: freshman sophomore junior senior. Emilio should join AIAA now and apply January 2027 for 2027-28 AY. Strong NASA-aligned profile.

opportunities.name: Lockheed Martin STEM Scholarship (via HSF/SHPE/NSBE)
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED for 2026-27 AY - awards pay Fall 2026
opportunities.notes: Applied through HSF SHPE or NSBE partner portals. Aerospace/engineering major required. Underrepresented minority students prioritized. Lockheed Martin also offers direct internships that come with housing stipends. Apply via partner orgs in Jan-Feb 2027.

opportunities.name: RTX (Raytheon Technologies) STEM Scholarship
opportunities.notes: Raytheon parent company RTX funds scholarships for STEM students. Administered through SHPE NSBE and SHPEtinas. Strong defense/aerospace engineering alignment. Military family background viewed favorably. Pair with RTX internship application.

opportunities.name: Thurgood Marshall College Fund (TMCF) Scholarship
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED for 2026-27 AY - awards pay Fall 2026
opportunities.notes: For students at HBCUs and other institutions. STEM priority scholarships available. Also manages corporate partner scholarships (AT&T Walmart etc). Create TMCF profile for all managed scholarships. Black student from military family with STEM focus is very competitive.

opportunities.name: NSBE Foundation Scholarship (National Society of Black Engineers)
opportunities.notes: Multiple awards within NSBE Foundation. NSBE membership required. Aerospace/engineering students competitive. Also check NSBE corporate sponsors (Boeing Northrop LM Raytheon run parallel scholarships through NSBE). Great networking vehicle.

opportunities.name: HACU National Internship Program (HNIP)
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED for Summer 2026; apply for Summer 2027
opportunities.notes: Places Hispanic students at federal agencies including NASA DOD DOE. Strong aerospace fit. Competitive. Future reference: apply January-February 2027 for Summer 2027. Students working at NASA Langley or Marshall have come through this program.

opportunities.name: Hispanic Scholarship Fund (HSF)
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED for 2026-27 AY - awards disbursed Aug 2026
opportunities.notes: Largest Hispanic scholarship organization in US. Awards still disburse in August 2026 for those who applied in Feb. Note for next year: deadline is early February. Pell-eligible applicants receive preference. Also check HSF corporate partner scholarships (Google Boeing LM often co-funded).

opportunities.name: UNCF/Koch Scholars Program
opportunities.notes: For Black students in economics or STEM at any accredited school. UNCF manages; Koch Industries funds. Annual program. Awards disburse Fall 2026 to those already selected. Check UNCF portal for other open opportunities.

opportunities.name: Congressional Hispanic Caucus Institute (CHCI) Scholarship
opportunities.notes: For Latino students demonstrating academic excellence and community leadership. Also offers paid congressional internships ($3000/session). Emilio's profile (military family + STEM + Latino) is very competitive. Apply January 2027.

opportunities.name: AFCEA Ralph W. Shrader Diversity Scholarships
opportunities.notes: Armed Forces Communications & Electronics Association. For students in STEM fields with ties to military/national security missions. Military family background is strong asset. Also check AFCEA chapter scholarships which may have later deadlines.

opportunities.name: National Military Family Association (NMFA) Scholarship
opportunities.notes: For children of active-duty veterans Guard/Reserve members. Emilio qualifies based on military family status. Award funds educational expenses. Disbursed for fall semester. Apply February 2027 for next cycle.

opportunities.name: SHPE Foundation Scholarship
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED for 2026-27 AY — application closed Feb 16, 2026. Next cycle opens Feb 2027.
opportunities.notes: Society of Hispanic Professional Engineers annual scholarship. SHPE membership required (typically ~$35 student rate). Aerospace/engineering priority. Deadline often falls in April. Contact SHPE national office to confirm if Fall 2026 cycle is still accepting. Strong candidate profile match. CRITICAL: ScholarSHPE 2026-27 common app deadline is April 30, 2026. Must be SHPE member. Apply at shpe.org/engage/programs/scholarshpe/

opportunities.name: DoD SMART Scholarship-for-Service
opportunities.award_amount: Full tuition + $25000-$38000 annual stipend + health insurance
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED - next cycle opens Sept 2026 for Fall 2027
opportunities.notes: Full-ride scholarship with guaranteed DOD civilian employment post-grad. Aerospace engineering is a perfect fit for defense sector. Emilio should apply for Fall 2027 cohort opening Sept 2026. Note: requires commitment to DOD service (1 year per year funded).

opportunities.name: NASA OSTEM Internship - Fall 2026
opportunities.notes: CONFIRMED open (NASA.gov). US citizen; GPA 3.0+; undergrad through grad. Aerospace engineering is prime fit. 10 wks summer / 15 wks fall. Stipend is ~$25-30/hr. Apply at stemgateway.nasa.gov.

opportunities.name: National GEM Consortium MS Fellowship
opportunities.award_amount: $16000 min stipend (entire MS) + full tuition + 2 paid summer internships
opportunities.notes: For underrepresented students entering MS/PhD in engineering or science. Employer sponsors pay stipend and internships. If Emilio is graduating and heading to grad school Fall 2026 he should be in the 2026 cohort (deadline Nov 2025). Critical: Apply Nov 2026 for Fall 2027 MS entry.

opportunities.name: UNCF General Scholarship Portal (multiple programs)
opportunities.application_status: ✅ CHECK PORTAL - some programs open year-round
opportunities.notes: UNCF manages 400+ scholarship programs. Several have rolling deadlines or late-spring openings. Create profile and apply to all matching programs. Key programs: Fund II Foundation STEM Scholars; Frederick Douglass Bicentennial Scholarship; Northern California Community Scholarship (for HBCU enrollment).

opportunities.name: Northrop Grumman STEM Scholarship (via UNCF/NSBE partnership)
opportunities.application_status: ❌ CLOSED for 2026-27 AY - check UNCF/NSBE portals
opportunities.notes: Northrop Grumman funds scholarships through UNCF and NSBE. Aerospace/engineering focus; minority students preferred. Also check Northrop's direct 'HBCU/HSI Grant Program'. Awards disburse Fall 2026 to current awardees.

opportunities.name: NSF Research Experiences for Undergraduates (REU) - Aerospace Sites
opportunities.award_amount: $5000-$8000 stipend + housing allowance at many sites
opportunities.deadline: Varies by site (summer sites mostly closed; fall sites may be open)
opportunities.notes: Individual REU sites set own deadlines. Summer 2026 sites are likely closed. Search for aerospace/mechanical/engineering sites with fall start dates at NSF REU site finder. Many sites actively recruit underrepresented students.

opportunities.name: Federal Pell Grant
opportunities.notes: Emilio qualifies as Pell-eligible. Automatic need-based grant; no separate application beyond FAFSA. Disbursed by school at start of each semester.

opportunities.name: DOE Science Undergraduate Laboratory Internship (SULI) - Fall 2026
opportunities.application_status: ✅ LIKELY OPEN - fall deadline typically June
opportunities.notes: CONFIRMED program (DOE.gov). 10-week internship at one of 17 national DOE labs. STEM engineering eligible. Fall session Aug-Dec. Paid weekly stipend + possible travel allowance. Strong NASA/aerospace connection at labs like NASA Glenn/JPL-adjacent.

opportunities.name: NC Space Grant Undergraduate Scholarship
opportunities.application_status: ⚠️ LIKELY CLOSED for Fall 2026; verify with NC State
opportunities.notes: NASA-funded; administered through NC Space Grant Consortium at NC State. For NC residents or students at NC institutions in STEM/aerospace. Awards typically paid in fall and spring semesters. Contact consortium directly.

opportunities.name: NC Need-Based Grant (NCNG)
opportunities.deadline: FAFSA-based (priority by March; late apps accepted)
opportunities.application_status: ✅ OPEN - automatic via FAFSA + state form
opportunities.notes: Automatic for NC residents demonstrating financial need who submit FAFSA. Disbursed by school at semester start. Pell-eligible students prioritized. Free money - no essay required. Administered by NC State Education Assistance Authority.

opportunities.name: NASA Pathways Internship (Student Trainee - Engineering)
opportunities.notes: Civil service pipeline internship; leads to permanent NASA employment post-graduation. Requires 15+ credit hours; 2.9+ GPA; available at multiple NASA centers (Johnson Houston; Kennedy FL; Langley VA; Marshall AL). Apply on USAJobs with keyword 'Student Trainee Aerospace'.
